info.title: eventloopOS Primitive API
info.description: Conservative OpenAPI skeleton generated from docs/primitives.catalog.json.

tags.name: agent_source_hooks
tags.description: Agent And Source Hooks: Poll Slack/GitHub/local/MCP/voice/agent-run sources into event routing and task sessions.

tags.name: ambient_autosave
tags.description: Ambient Autosave: Debounced current-task workspace capture with manual-mode skip, follows windows, blocklists, task-window claim filtering, tagged-window inference, process-tree claim inference, and process-root claim expansion.

tags.name: context_capture_restore
tags.description: Context Capture And Restore: Store context resources and manage local restore requests for browser tabs, files, and deeplinks.

tags.name: follows_windows
tags.description: Follows Windows: Detect windows seen across several workspaces and move them with focused task workspace unless excluded.

tags.name: mac_app_hotkeys
tags.description: Mac App And Hotkey Surface: Swift macOS queue UI, hotkeys, manual mode, restore, voice capture, and master command shell.

tags.name: manual_mode
tags.description: Manual Mode: Pause automation, save manual desktop, block queue lease-next, and restore or preserve manual desk.

tags.name: master_command_router
tags.description: Master Command Router: Route one universal command to tasks, idle sessions, fan-out targets, or queue prioritization.

tags.name: observability_proofs
tags.description: Observability And Proof Harnesses: Health, metrics, activity, proof runners, latency checks, and machine-readable manifests.

tags.name: queue_paper_routing
tags.description: Queue And Paper Routing: Route external events into prioritized human-review papers with actions, leases, lineage, and idempotency.

tags.name: runtime_spine
tags.description: Runtime Spine: Flat dependency record for routes, timers, stores, workspace, sessions, observability, and source polling.

tags.name: task_session_control
tags.description: Task Session Control: Provider-neutral task session list/start/bind/followup/replace for Codex, Claude, fake, and terminal sessions.

tags.name: task_window_claims
tags.description: Task Window Claims: Declare or infer that windows belong to tasks by window identity or process root so foreign windows do not pollute active paper snapshots.

tags.name: task_workspace_memory
tags.description: Task Workspace Memory: Persist task-specific workspace snapshots so later papers inherit task desk state.

tags.name: workspace_control
tags.description: Workspace Control: Capture macOS/AeroSpace window state, plan bounded restores, execute safe workspace/window/frame moves.
